description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:7.9.0 Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Include a before_script that runs npm install for all jobs. Define a test stage with a test job that runs CI=true npm test. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs CI=true npm run build, then removes any existing public directory with rm -rf public, moves the build folder to public with mv build public, and publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact, only on the master branch.
